expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: Matched focus tokens in outputs: promotion, finalization, behavior, stable, another, feature

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Primary phase token found in output content: holdout

uncertainties: Local heuristic grader used instead of Codex-backed grading due external grader instability.
workarounds: Expectation scoring is based on deterministic token and phrase matching over output artifacts.
